mapper.select: select * from fp_alert_state where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
select * from fp_alert_state where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and alert_key = #{alertKey}
select count(1) from fp_alert_state where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
select count(1) from fp_alert_state where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and status = #{status}
select count(1) from fp_alert_state where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and current_level = #{level}
mapper.insert: insert into fp_alert_state ( id, tenant_id, alert_key, rule_id, metric_definition_id, object_type, object_id, object_code, object_name, topology_id, topology_element_id, topology_element_type, current_level, previous_level, status, first_triggered_at, last_changed_at, last_evaluated_at, recovered_at, trigger_value, message, reason_json, acknowledged, acknowledged_by, acknowledged_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{id}, #{tenantId}, #{alertKey}, #{ruleId}, #{metricDefinitionId}, #{objectType}, #{objectId}, #{objectCode}, #{objectName}, #{topologyId}, #{topologyElementId}, #{topologyElementType}, #{currentLevel}, #{previousLevel}, #{status}, #{firstTriggeredAt}, #{lastChangedAt}, #{lastEvaluatedAt}, #{recoveredAt}, #{triggerValue}, #{message}, #{reasonJson}, #{acknowledged}, #{acknowledgedBy}, #{acknowledgedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: update fp_alert_state set rule_id = #{ruleId}, metric_definition_id = #{metricDefinitionId}, object_type = #{objectType}, object_id = #{objectId}, object_code = #{objectCode}, object_name = #{objectName}, topology_id = #{topologyId}, topology_element_id = #{topologyElementId}, topology_element_type = #{topologyElementType}, current_level = #{currentLevel}, previous_level = #{previousLevel}, status = #{status}, first_triggered_at = #{firstTriggeredAt}, last_changed_at = #{lastChangedAt}, last_evaluated_at = #{lastEvaluatedAt}, recovered_at = #{recoveredAt}, trigger_value = #{triggerValue}, message = #{message}, reason_json = #{reasonJson}, acknowledged = #{acknowledged}, acknowledged_by = #{acknowledgedBy}, acknowledged_at = #{acknowledgedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
